snippet: Skip to main content An official website of the State of Georgia. How you know Language icon English Organizations The .gov means it’s official. Local, state, and federal government websites often end in .gov. State of Georgia government websites and email systems use “georgia.gov” or “ga.gov” at the end of the address. Before sharing sensitive or personal information, make sure you’re on an official state website. Still not sure? Call 1-800-GEORGIA to verify that a website is an official website of the State of Georgia.
